title: Countering Chinese State-Sponsored Actors Compromise of Networks Worldwide to Fe

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Countering Chinese State-Sponsored Actors Compromise of Netw
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*1.pcap*'
            - '*bfv.bund.de*'
            - '*bnd.bund.de*'
            - '*bsi.bund.de*'
            - '*cert.incident*'
            - '*cyber.gc.ca*'
            - '*cyber.go.jp*'
            - '*cyber.gov.au*'
            - '*cyber.int*'
            - '*cyber.nsa.gov*'
            - '*mail.cisa.dhs.gov*'
            - '*map.tcl*'
            - '*mycap.pcap*'
            - '*ncsc.govt.nz*'
            - '*nsa.gov*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Countering_Chinese_State_Sponsored_Actor {
    meta:
        description = "Countering Chinese State-Sponsored Actors Compromise of Netw"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "8b448f47e36909f3a921b4ff803cf3a61985d8a10f0fe594b405b92ed0fc21f1" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "a1abc3d11c16ae83b9a7cf62ebe6d144dfc5e19b579a99bad062a9d31cf30bfe" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "da692ea0b7f24e31696f8b4fe8a130dbbe3c7c15cea6bde24cccc1fb0a73ae9e" ascii nocase
        $h3 = "f2bbba1ea0f34b262f158ff31e00d39d89bbc471d04e8fca60a034cabe18e4f4" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
